title: Great Time To Own These REITs - Brad Thomas With Kirk Spano
text: Brad Thomas talks to Kirk Spano about REITs and real estate investing. Are industrial REITs underappreciated and which US regions look the best?

title: REITs Get No Respect
text: 'I don't get no respect' was Rodney Dangerfield's way of saying "no one liked me." I know what it feels like when nobody likes you, especially being a REIT analyst and investor. While Mr. Market gives REITs no respect, I certainly do, and I have a high level of confidence that they will not only survive but thrive in the months ahead.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Second Quarter 2023 Dividend
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Trust Managers of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) declared a second quarter cash dividend of $1.00 per share to holders of record as of June 30, 2023 of its Common Shares of Beneficial Interest. The dividend is to be paid on July 17, 2023. Camden Property Trust, an S&P 500 Company, is a real estate company primarily engaged in the ownership, management, development, redevelopment, acquisition, and construction of multifamily apartment.

title: Stay The Course: This Too Will Pass
text: The artificial intelligence craze has taken over the markets last week.

title: Camden (CPT) Sees Occupancy and Rent Growth Through May
text: Camden's (CPT) Q2 operating update reveals an improvement in the occupancy level and rents through May.

title: Want to Boost Your Passive Income? Buy These 3 Stocks in June
text: Camden Property makes it easy to be a landlord. Realty Income lives up to its name.

title: Camden Property Trust: Sunbelt Exposure Looks Appealing, Valuation Is Fair
text: Camden Property Trust is a REIT that has a residential portfolio focused on the Sunbelt with only a 10% exposure to California. The REIT recorded very solid 8% rent growth in Q1 2023, and Camden Property Trust management has raised its full year 2023 growth guidance to 5%. My calculations indicate that Camden Property Trust investors could earn a double-digit return over the next three years.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Participation in Nareit's REITweek 2023 Investor Conference and Provides Second Quarter 2023 Operating Update
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) (the “Company”) announced today that it will participate in Nareit's REITweek 2023 Investor Conference which is being held June 6-8, 2023. The Company also provided operating statistics for second quarter 2023 as detailed below. Same Property Occupancy 1Q23 April 2023 May 2023 Occupancy 95.3% 95.4% 95.5%         Same Property New Lease and Renewal Data – Date Signed(1) 1Q23 April 2023 May 2023 New Lease Rates 1.8% 2.7% 3.6% Renewal Rat.

title: A Year From Now, You'll Be Happy You're A REIT Investor
text: I put together the "dream team" list below of some spectacular REITs that I'm encouraging you to gobble up. I own all of these, and I plan to meet with all of their management teams next week at REIT Week (in NYC). I'll check back with you in 12 months to see how this list of "dream team" REITs is holding up. I like the odds!
